title: Monthly Sea Fisheries Statistics September 2025
body: "Highlights   The total quantity of landings by UK vessels (tonnes) decreased in September 2025 compared to 2024, down 36%. The value of landings in September 2025 (£63.7m) decreased compared to 2024 down by 28%. Landings in September 2025 were comprised of more Pelagic species (49%). Demersal species comprised the majority of the value landed (39%), with Shellfish species also high at 37%.  "
